Hi, I'm Elizaveta

I build AI-powered tools for media operations at scale.

6+ years in YouTube content operations — 100+ Shorts channels, 15+ languages, 4 brand groups. I take operational problems and build working solutions using Apps Script, YouTube API, Gemini AI, and Sheets. No dev team needed. Just results.

Languages: English · Russian · Italian · Spanish
Education: MA Intl Relations, Univ. of Florence · BA HSE Moscow
Location: Nice, France · Open to remote work globally
